text.tspan: Deterministic diagnostic workflow · read-only investigation · human-approved remediation
Fix peer ID / local ID configuration
PSK match or certificate trust chain
Verify PSK, certificate, CA and expiry
Align IKE proposals and DH group
Enable NAT-T and confirm UDP 4500 path
Add or adjust policy after change
Add exempt rule after change approval
Escalation package: logs, SA state, selectors, routes, policies,
Read-only investigation · remediation requires engineer review and change approval
